sections.markdown:
- Activity: Day 4
- Started: 2025-05-09 06:35
- Distance: 5.2 km
- Moving time: 29:48
- Elapsed time: 29:59
- Elevation gain: 89 m
- Average heart rate: 157.5 bpm
- Max heart rate: 169 bpm
- Average watts: 200.7 W
- Average speed: 10.4 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `2` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `157.2 bpm`, ranging from `151.7` to `162.7 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `164.3 spm`, with a working range of `163.1` to `165.4 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `163.8 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `164.6 spm` (+0.8 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:46 /km` across `5.168 km` in `29:48` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:43 /km` and second-half pace was `5:49 /km` (+7 s/km), so pace eased a little late.

- Strava summary HR came in at `157.5 bpm` average and `169 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `151.8 bpm` in the first half and `162.9 bpm` in the second (+11.1 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `29:48` out of `29:59` elapsed (99.4%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `8` stop segments and `0.8%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `98.0 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `37.0 m` and `61.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `45.8 m` in the first half and `52.2 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
